description.value:
You are fully transformed into a massive wolf. You gain the following while this effect is active and your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • Land Speed becomes at least 40 feet
  • +4 status bonus to Perception and Survival (Track)
  • Imprecise scent 30 feet
  • Unarmed Strikes become Dire Bite (2d8 piercing, trip, deadly d10) and Claws (1d8 slashing, agile)
  • Size becomes Large (or Powerful Build if already Large+)

You cannot speak, manipulate objects, or use abilities requiring hands while this effect is active.

Remove this effect to revert to human form.
description.gm: This effect sets the wolf-human:beast-form roll option, which gates the Apex Wolf feat's physical resistance. The speed is set via BaseSpeed (land-speed = 40) so characters with higher base speed keep their speed.
